about.label: Profile_Info
about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a passionate DevOps Engineer and SRE with a deep focus on observability and automation. My mission is to bridge the gap between development and operations by implementing robust CI/CD pipelines and scalable infrastructure.
about.p2: With expertise in cloud-native technologies and a strong background in Linux systems, I help organizations achieve high availability and operational excellence through modern SRE practices.

skills.title: Technical Stack
skills.subtitle: A comprehensive set of tools and technologies I use to build and maintain modern infrastructure.

ing_sre.title: DevOps Engineer | SRE
ing_sre.description: Specialized in observability, automation, and infrastructure as code to ensure high availability and scalability of critical systems.

wiedii_sysadmin.title: Security & Infrastructure Architect
wiedii_sysadmin.description: I ensured high availability of critical environments by deploying monitoring stacks (Prometheus/Grafana/ELK) and creating automation scripts for proactive incident management and post-mortem reporting.

emsitel_sysadmin.title: SysAdmin Technician
emsitel_sysadmin.description: Specialist in technological infrastructure with experience in multiplatform server administration and private cloud deployment.

applus_revisor.title: HFC Infrastructure Technical Reviewer
applus_revisor.description: Coordinated the reception and auditing of HFC infrastructure, managing the administrative cycle of network projects and leading technical training for staff to ensure operational efficiency.

blog.title: Latest Insights
blog.subtitle: Sharing my thoughts on DevOps, SRE, and cloud technologies.

contact.title: Let's build something stable
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, automation challenges, or SRE opportunities. Feel free to reach out!
